'''Goff''' was the name of an [[XQ5 Platform]] used by the [[Airam (group)|Airam]], located in the [[Goff system/Legends|Goff system]]. It was supposedly a supply station for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] as well. Her defenses included a pair of [[R-41 Starchaser]] squadrons, shuttles, and two [[IPV-1 System Patrol Craft|IPV-1 Patrol Craft]].

==History==
After learning of Airam forces supporting the Rebels, the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Rage (Imperial-class)|''Rage'']], along with the [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Interdictor]] ''[[Compellor]]'', targeted the station for attack and seizure to serve as an example to Airam forces who were trying to support the Rebellion. They attacked the station with [[TIE/IN interceptor/Legends|TIE/In interceptors]] from [[Avenger Squadron]] as well as a force of [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE/sa bombers]]. They captured the station along with a [[Beta-class ETR-3 escort transport]] containing Rebel officers; the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperials]] were then attacked by the Rebel [[Nebulon-B2 frigate]] ''[[Colada]]'' which targeted the ''Compellor'' and launched [[Z-95 Headhunter/Legends|Z-95 Headhunters]] from [[Azul Squadron]] and [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wings]] from [[Grez Squadron]]. The attack failed and, after their shields had been taken down they were given a chance to surrender. The Rebels refused and the frigate was destroyed.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter: Balance of Power Campaigns]]'' {{1st}}
